task_desc: Left sidebar -- Chat Box. Add a chat input below the activity feed. User types a question ("why didn't you feed the fly when it was hungry?", "what do you think the fly needs next?"), it's sent to Claude with relevant database context (last N observations, recent actions, incident history around the time in question). Claude responds with data-backed answers referencing specific timestamps. Chat history persisted in chat_messages table. Files: `js/caretaker-sidebar.js` (chat UI), `server/caretaker.js` (chat endpoint -- queries DB, builds context, calls Claude), `agent/chat-policy.md` (system prompt for chat mode).
